svg.text: SUKABUMI ORC STATION — SYSTEM WIRING DIAGRAM
OpenRiverCam | Rev 3.0 | 2026-03-10 | Solar-Powered PoE Camera System
1. Camera power-cycled via relay triggered by Pi USB.
Pi ON = relay closed = PoE ON = camera boots.
2. No heaters (Sukabumi tropical climate, solar power budget).
3. Conformal coating MG 422C on all exposed PCBs
4. Dielectric grease on all outdoor electrical connections.
5. Gore vent on enclosure for pressure equalization.
7. Cycle: 2.5 min ON / 12.5 min SLEEP (96 cycles/day).
8. Pi 5 built-in RTC (ML-2020 coin cell) provides scheduling
